checks.title: Contact page calls a method exported by the contact API wrapper
checks.evidence: Contact page call matches the wrapper export.
checks.recommendation: Use contactApi.submit(name, email, subject, message), or add a send(formData) wrapper that calls POST /api/contact.

checks.title: Contact submission reports failures honestly
checks.evidence: Contact catch path does not show success.
checks.recommendation: Show an error toast in the catch path and preserve form contents unless the POST succeeds.

checks.title: Checkout routing matches checkout business rules
checks.evidence: Checkout route protection and checkout branches are aligned.
checks.recommendation: Either remove the guest checkout branch or make /checkout public and implement a deliberate guest order flow.

checks.title: Coupon application return shape matches checkout UI expectations
checks.evidence: Coupon result shape matches checkout usage.
checks.recommendation: Return discount from cartStore.applyCoupon or read the updated discount value from store state in Checkout.

checks.title: Checkout order summary treats coupon discount as a percentage
checks.evidence: Checkout computes a discount amount from subtotal and percentage.
checks.recommendation: Render the order-summary discount as subtotal * discount / 100 and label the percentage separately.

checks.title: Removing a coupon handles a missing cart
checks.evidence: removeCoupon returns a successful empty-cart response before populate when no cart exists.
checks.recommendation: Return a successful empty-cart response when no cart exists, or create/load a cart before populating.

checks.title: Core route auth boundaries match the intended storefront flow
checks.evidence: Cart and order routers apply router.use(protect); contact POST remains public in Backend/routes/contactRoutes.js.
checks.recommendation: Keep cart and order routes protected, and keep public contact submission separate from admin contact routes.

checks.title: Checkout has a production payment state
checks.evidence: Checkout announces demo payment behavior in Frontend/Ecommerce-main/my-app/src/pages/Checkout.jsx:285; orders are created without a payment provider.
checks.recommendation: Add a payment provider contract before production: payment intent creation, confirmation, failure handling, order payment status, and refund path.

checks.title: Stock is enforced during cart and order workflows
checks.evidence: Product stock exists in Backend/models/Product.js:36, but cart/order controllers do not consistently validate or decrement it.
checks.recommendation: Validate stock in cart add/update and atomically decrement or reserve stock during order creation.
